notes: Tightened mushroom edible-route classification so medicinal-only, tea-extract-only, other-use, warning/comparison, caution, emergency-only, and non-culinary tea records do not appear in normal edible mushroom lane lists.
Reclassified Chaga as a medicinal/traditional tea fungus rather than a normal edible mushroom while keeping it visible in medicinal/other-use contexts.
Added Memorial Sloan Kettering Chaga safety/source link and strengthened Chaga medication/kidney/oxalate caution framing.
Cleaned placeholder medicinal text handling so phrases like primarily culinary in this guide or no practical medicinal use do not make records appear medicinal.
